name: Winter Vegetable Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, combine butter, leeks, carrots, onions, celery, and spices.
2. Cover with water and bring to a simmer until vegetables are tender.
3. When vegetables are tender, remove 3/4 of the contents from the saucepan and puree in a blender.
4. Return purée to the saucepan.
5. Add cream, chopped tomatoes, mushrooms, and watercress.
6. Season with salt, black pepper, and white pepper as desired.
7. Simmer for an additional 10 minutes.
8. Serve with crusty bread and enjoy!
